issue_title: Preferences>Colours preview fails to take up all available horizontal space
issue_body_preview:
### Describe the issue you are having
Preferences>Colours preview fails to take up all available horizontal space

### Did you connect to an already running interpreter or start the interpreter from RIDE?
Start an interpreter

### How do you reproduce the issue?
Preferences>Colours
![image](
test_description_zh: 打开 Preferences（偏好设置）对话框，切换到 Colours（颜色）选项卡，观察颜色预览区域的水平宽度是否占满了可用的水平空间。
expected_result_zh: 颜色预览区域应占满所有可用的水平空间，不应在右侧留有不必要的空白区域。
